runTitle: Production Cloud Run direct API post-deploy QA - v8.12.110 boundary guard closure
coveredSurfaces: GitLab tag pipeline 2582961881 succeeded for v8.12.110
Vercel production version smoke passed for v8.12.110
Cloud Run service limits remained cpu=1 and memory=512Mi
direct API network-ranking prompt returned deterministic monitoring-metric-ranking response
direct API unsupported GPU metric prompt returned deterministic monitoring-boundary-guard clarification
direct API explicit unknown server prompt returned deterministic not-found clarification
direct API ambiguous single-server prompt returned deterministic boundary clarification
direct API inverse-status prompt returned deterministic server-health with finalAgent=Metrics Query Agent
direct API contextual follow-up prompt preserved target scope
Langfuse supervisor trace query completed; sampled rows still included historical failures, so direct API response metadata is the primary acceptance evidence
skippedSurfaces: Browser AI sidebar was not repeated because the changed runtime surface is Cloud Run supervisor routing and the direct API covered the failing production path
Public snapshot sync was not requested

plannerShadowObservations.source: Cloud Run direct API response metadata

expertAssessments.rationale: The production direct API boundary prompt pack now passes 6/6, including deterministic clarification policies and inverse healthy-status metadata.

Langfuse supervisor query completed, but sampled rows still contained historical failure traces; direct response metadata is sufficient for release acceptance while trace freshness can be watched in routine observability.
GitLab release pipeline, production version smoke, Cloud Run health, and free-tier resource limits were verified.

usageChecks.summary: Cloud Run ai-engine remained at cpu=1 and memory=512Mi after v8.12.110 deployment.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1 --format='value(status.url,spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits)'

artifacts.label: v8.12.110 Cloud Run direct API boundary post-deploy pass evidence

completedImprovements.title: Cloud Run direct supervisor short-circuits deterministic boundary clarifications and reports inverse-status metadata as Metrics Query
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.110 production direct API passed all six boundary prompts, including unsupported GPU, unknown server, ambiguous server, inverse-status metadata, network ranking, and contextual follow-up.
completedImprovements.note: Closed by deterministic_clarification short-circuit support and inverse healthy-status metrics classification.
